title: The Clockwork Train
description: A journey north begins, racing against time.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Vera, we should rest while we can. The journey will take all day.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Rest? How can you rest? We're on an adventure! Save the Professor, find out with the creepers want with his pocket watch, save the day!

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: ht mkee you think it's a pocket watch?

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Everything the professor does, involves a pocket watch. I have one right here... so do you, somewhere...

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Every time I close my eyes, I see Da in danger.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: I know a trick. Close your..

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: So do I. Tea. It never fails.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: A gentleman in fine clothes sits across from you, reading. He glances over the pages.

opening.speaker: Gentleman
opening.text: Traveling alone, young miss? That's quite unusual. Do your parents know where you are?

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: I'm visiting my aunt up north. My... my companions keep me safe.

closing.speaker: Gentleman
closing.text: Ah, clockwork companions. Marvelous craftsmanship. Your father must be quite skilled.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: His tone unsettles you. You say nothing.

closing.speaker: Gentleman
closing.text: You know, I once met an inventor who specialized in temporal mechanics. Brilliant man. Tragic that such minds attract... unwanted attention.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Some might say the tragedy is the unwanted attention from lesser minds.

closing.speaker: Gentleman
closing.text: Certain types of knowledge are dangerous, child. Be careful which doors you open. And what you do with the time you have at your disposal.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: He returns to his newspaper. You settle back into your seat and look at the scenery for a long time.

choices.text: Keep to ourselves and stay quiet. Don't draw attention.
Ask the gentleman directly if he knows about the Order. He clearly knows something.

puzzle.title: The Heartbeat Engine
puzzle.instructions: The train's mechanical heart beats in a pattern. Breathe with it to calm your nerves.
